task_completion.description: Verify that the BFI25.csv dataset is loaded in Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window is open, displaying a spreadsheet with columns like A1, A2, etc., and the window title or data tab indicates 'BFI25.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Exploratory Factor Analysis module is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Exploratory Factor Analysis' setup panel is visible on the left side of the Jamovi interface, and an EFA results section is visible on the right.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 25 personality items are included and demographic variables are excluded
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EFA variable selection box, items A1 through O5 are listed under 'Variables'. The variables 'gender' and 'age' must NOT be in this list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the analysis is set to extract exactly 5 factors using oblimin rotation
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EFA options panel, 'Fixed number' of factors is selected and set to '5' (or the output table shows exactly 5 factors). Under Rotation, 'Oblimin' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that KMO measure of sampling adequacy and Bartlett's test of sphericity are selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Assumption Checks' in the EFA options, the checkboxes for 'KMO measure of sampling adequacy' and 'Bartlett's test of sphericity' are checked, OR the corresponding results tables are visible in the output panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the analysis is saved to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' and filename 'BFI_FactorAnalysis.omv', OR the Jamovi window title shows 'BFI_FactorAnalysis.omv', OR a file manager/terminal shows the file created at that exact location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jamovi application interface being interacted with (clicking menus, dragging variables), rather than just terminal commands or R scripts running in the background.

integrity.description: Verify the results shown in the Jamovi output panel match the expected format of an EFA analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The output tables (Factor Loadings, Assumption Checks) look like standard Jamovi rendered tables, not manually typed text or pasted images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is actually using Jamovi
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches Jamovi's distinct ribbon and split-pane layout (data/setup on left, results on right), not a different statistical software like SPSS or RStudio.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is 'BFI25.csv'. The analysis requires exactly 25 items (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) to be included in the EFA. Variables 'gender' and 'age' must be excluded. The EFA must be configured to extract exactly 5 factors using 'oblimin' rotation. Assumption checks must include KMO and Bartlett's test. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI_FactorAnalysis.omv'.
